title: Senior Software Engineer - Amazon India Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Amazon India Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Amazon India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
